prompt_text: A tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, lying weakly on a bed; a delicate ancient Chinese noble boy prodigy, pale skin, bright restrained dark eyes, elegant oval face, neat black hair tied with jade crown, slim scholarly build, moon-white hanfu with subtle brocade, calm and painfully mature expression, standing on tiptoe beside the bed in silence. Wide shot from a slightly low angle, the bed placed slightly right of center as the visual focus, a porcelain congee bowl glowing warmly on a small bedside table in the right foreground, blurred bed-curtain edge obscuring the left foreground, the boy small in scale at the left side of the bed with side-back rim light outlining his silhouette. Dim dreamlike ancient bedroom with dark gray-blue walls, shadowed lattice window, old wooden furniture, large areas of black negative space, oppressive enclosed interior. Low-saturation warm-cool contrast, amber candlelight against cold window light, cinematic realism, restrained historical drama atmosphere, subtle film grain, highly detailed textures.
